title: Automations on date fields at subitem level allow increase by hour
excerpt:
Currently, automations on date fields at the subitem level can only increase by a day or week. 
I would like an option to increase it by hour

posts.author: Natjur (Nathan Jurgens)
posts.cookedHtml:
Currently, automations on date fields at the subitem level can only increase by a day or week.

I would like an option to increase it by hour
